name: wechat-agent-bridge
description: Control a local Codex CLI daemon from a bound personal WeChat account through MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Expose local WeChat bridge controls to Codex through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Provides MCP tools for checking WeChat binding, reading bridge history, clearing sessions, interrupting or resuming the local Codex agent, and changing cwd or sandbox mode.
defaultPrompt: Set the bridge mode to workspace.
